Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Feiora Torannus]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 9''' — Overlord Feiora wears a dark leather breastplate and hardened leather on her shins and forearms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 9''' — Feiora is an Overlord who has a raven.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 10''' — Feiora has a Territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 10''' — Feiora finished a discussion with Indirial.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 12''' — Feiora can open a Gate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 12''' — Feiora can summon a spear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 14''' — Feiora has a raven named Eugan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 14''' — Feiora is someone Lycus wants to get back to and help.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 21''' — Feiora Torannus is an Overlord.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
